statements.query: MATCH (s)-[r:HAS_NODE]->(node) WHERE (s:AzureCluster OR s:AzureClusterAgentPool) AND (node:AzureVirtualMachine OR node:AzureVirtualMachineScaleSet) AND r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r return COUNT(*) as TotalCompleted

name: cleanup Azure AKS to Compute relationships
